title: Low Items
description: JBlock wanted to give a more LOW and modern aesthetic to Minecraft items, giving it a more realistic and optimized aesthetic, changing both items and blocks in their item version.
body:
Does not require any external plugin and is compatible with other TexturePack/ResourcePack.
![Minecraft Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa34fda25f8c456b80ddc0cffae572830201c62.png)
Changes:
Item sizes decreased, (Better performance and better appearance)
Item rotation and item block modeling have been rotated.
_![MinecraftItems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0404f4437a6c6268e26d7835530c9aabc2910cd1_0.webp)_
